title: boehmeria virgata var. canescens
intro: Boehmeria virgata var. canescens, also known as a type of nettle tree or Boehmeria virgata, is a plant species in the Urticaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Boehmeria virgata var. canescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Boehmeria virgata var. canescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal purposes, or used in topical applications such as ointments or creams for skin conditions.
